description: Test prompts for RQ1+RQ2 Combined Test Suite - 40 prompts total (10 per category) with expected validations

test_cases.title: Simple Pick Action
test_cases.user_prompt: Pick up test_tube_blood

test_cases.title: Simple Home Return
test_cases.user_prompt: Return to home position

test_cases.title: Simple Gripper Clear
test_cases.user_prompt: Ensure gripper is empty

test_cases.title: Simple Pick Different Object
test_cases.user_prompt: Pick up beaker_water

test_cases.title: Simple Pick Flask
test_cases.user_prompt: Pick up flask_buffer

test_cases.title: Simple Pick Tube
test_cases.user_prompt: Pick up test_tube_phenol

test_cases.title: Simple Wait Action
test_cases.user_prompt: Wait for 3 seconds

test_cases.title: Simple Pick Hydrochloric Acid
test_cases.user_prompt: Pick up test_tube_hydrochloric_acid

test_cases.title: Simple Pick Sodium Hydroxide
test_cases.user_prompt: Pick up test_tube_sodium_hydroxide

test_cases.title: Simple Pick Reagent
test_cases.user_prompt: Pick up test_tube_reagent

test_cases.title: Compound - Pick and Place
test_cases.user_prompt: Pick up test_tube_blood and place it in biohazard_bin

test_cases.title: Compound - Pour Action
test_cases.user_prompt: Pour test_tube_phenol into beaker_water

test_cases.title: Compound - Shake Action
test_cases.user_prompt: Shake test_tube_blood for 5 seconds

test_cases.title: Compound - Swirl Action
test_cases.user_prompt: Swirl beaker_water gently

test_cases.title: Compound - Multi-Object Disposal
test_cases.user_prompt: Dispose test_tube_phenol and test_tube_hydrochloric_acid in biohazard_bin

test_cases.title: Compound - Pour and Shake
test_cases.user_prompt: Pour test_tube_sodium_hydroxide into beaker_water then shake the beaker

test_cases.title: Compound - Transfer Liquid
test_cases.user_prompt: Transfer liquid from test_tube_blood into beaker_water

test_cases.title: Compound - Pick, Swirl, Place
test_cases.user_prompt: Pick up test_tube_reagent, swirl it, then place it back

test_cases.title: Compound - Sequential Pours
test_cases.user_prompt: Pour test_tube_phenol into beaker_water, then pour test_tube_sodium_hydroxide into the same beaker

test_cases.title: Compound - Clean Workspace
test_cases.user_prompt: Clean up workspace by moving all test tubes to biohazard_bin

test_cases.title: Constraint - Exact Coordinates
test_cases.user_prompt: Place test_tube_blood at exact coordinates x=200, y=300

test_cases.title: Constraint - Speed Specification
test_cases.user_prompt: Pick up test_tube_phenol at simulation speed 3

test_cases.title: Constraint - Area Placement
test_cases.user_prompt: Place test_tube_blood in area bounded by x from -100 to 100, y from -100 to 100

test_cases.title: Constraint - Negative Coordinates
test_cases.user_prompt: Place beaker_water at coordinates x=-400, y=-500

test_cases.title: Constraint - Edge of Workspace
test_cases.user_prompt: Place test_tube_reagent at the edge of workspace at coordinates x=750, y=750

test_cases.title: Constraint - Slow Speed
test_cases.user_prompt: Move test_tube_hydrochloric_acid to biohazard_bin at slowest speed

test_cases.title: Constraint - Fast Speed
test_cases.user_prompt: Pick up flask_buffer and move it quickly at speed 1

test_cases.title: Constraint - Specific Wait Duration
test_cases.user_prompt: Wait for exactly 10 seconds before proceeding

test_cases.title: Constraint - Centered Placement
test_cases.user_prompt: Place test_tube_sodium_hydroxide at the center of workspace at coordinates x=0, y=0

test_cases.title: Constraint - Multiple Coordinates
test_cases.user_prompt: Place test_tube_blood at x=100, y=200, then place test_tube_phenol at x=-100, y=-200

test_cases.title: Novel - Spectroscopy Preparation
test_cases.user_prompt: Prepare spectroscopy sample: first pick up beaker_water, then pour test_tube_reagent into it, next add flask_buffer for dilution, swirl the mixture gently for 5 seconds, wait for 10 seconds to settle, then place the beaker at coordinates (300, 300) for analysis

test_cases.title: Novel - Density Gradient
test_cases.user_prompt: Create density gradient by layering test_tube_phenol at bottom of beaker_water followed by flask_buffer

test_cases.title: Novel - Calibration Procedure
test_cases.user_prompt: Perform system calibration by sequentially testing each gripper position with test_tube_blood

test_cases.title: Novel - Sample Mixing Protocol
test_cases.user_prompt: Execute comprehensive mixing protocol: first pick up beaker_water and place it at coordinates (200, 200), then pour test_tube_blood into the beaker, next add test_tube_reagent to the mixture, shake vigorously for 30 seconds, wait 15 seconds for chemical reaction, swirl gently for 5 seconds, and finally return to home position

test_cases.title: Novel - Titration Setup
test_cases.user_prompt: Set up titration experiment: first prepare beaker_water as the titration vessel and place it at coordinates (0, 0), then carefully pick up test_tube_sodium_hydroxide and pour it into the beaker as analyte, swirl gently for 3 seconds, wait 5 seconds for stabilization, now pick up test_tube_hydrochloric_acid as titrant and place it at coordinates (100, 100) ready for addition, then pour the acid slowly into the beaker, wait 10 seconds for reaction completion

test_cases.title: Novel - Precipitation Reaction
test_cases.user_prompt: Initiate precipitation reaction: first pick up beaker_water and place at coordinates (250, 250), then add test_tube_phenol to the beaker, swirl gently for 5 seconds to mix, wait 8 seconds for dissolution, now slowly pour test_tube_sodium_hydroxide into the mixture, shake the beaker for 10 seconds to ensure thorough mixing, wait 20 seconds for precipitation to occur, then place the beaker in biohazard_bin for disposal

test_cases.title: Novel - Temperature Equilibration
test_cases.user_prompt: Allow samples to reach thermal equilibrium by leaving test_tube_blood and test_tube_reagent undisturbed for 15 seconds

test_cases.title: Novel - Serial Dilution
test_cases.user_prompt: Perform serial dilution: first pick up beaker_water as vessel 1 and place at (100, 0), pour half of test_tube_reagent into it, then add flask_buffer for 1:2 dilution, shake for 5 seconds, pick up another beaker and place at (200, 0), pour from vessel 1 into it, add more flask_buffer for 1:4 dilution, shake for 5 seconds, pick up a third beaker and place at (300, 0), pour from vessel 2, add flask_buffer for 1:8 dilution, shake for 5 seconds, wait 10 seconds for equilibration

test_cases.title: Novel - Quality Control Check
test_cases.user_prompt: Conduct quality control by inspecting test_tube_blood color, then swirling gently to check viscosity

test_cases.title: Novel - Extraction Protocol
test_cases.user_prompt: Perform liquid-liquid extraction: first prepare beaker_water as extraction vessel and place at coordinates (150, 150), then add test_tube_blood as aqueous phase, swirl gently for 3 seconds, now add test_tube_phenol as organic phase, shake vigorously for 30 seconds for thorough mixing, wait 45 seconds for phase separation, carefully pick up the beaker and place at coordinates (400, 400) for observation, wait another 30 seconds for complete separation, then move to home position
